default_style: calm, intimate, hypnotic, slow with natural pauses, warm and reassuring, like a trusted guide sitting close

settle.style: grounding, present, conversational but slow, noticing things together

induction.style: slightly slower, discovering together, gentle wonder, soft observations

deepening.style: intimate, deliberate, each word landing with weight, warm authority

trance.style: dreamy, floating, words dissolving into space, hypnotic monotone

deep.style: barely there, single words emerging from silence, presence without effort

emergence.style: gradually brightening, warmer, gentle return, like sunrise

relax_breathe.style: soft, rhythmic, guiding breath, steady and calm
